name: io.github.conorbronsdon/podcastindex-mcp
title: Podcast Index MCP Server
description: MCP server for the Podcast Index API — search podcasts and episodes, track guest appearances by person, monitor trending shows, and check feed health.

environmentVariables.name: PODCASTINDEX_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Podcast Index API key — free at https://api.podcastindex.org

environmentVariables.name: PODCASTINDEX_API_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Podcast Index API secret issued with your API key
